hooks.command: file_path=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -q '\.learnkit/.*/lessons/.*\.html$'; then learnkit lesson-verify $(echo "$file_path" | sed 's|.*/\.learnkit/||' | sed 's|/lessons/| |' | sed 's|/| |' | sed 's|\.html$||') 2>&1 || echo '[LearnKit] ⚠️ 教案验证失败，请检查模板完整性'; fi

output=$(echo '$TOOL_OUTPUT' | head -20); if echo "$output" | grep -q 'Lesson written\|progress-update\|scope-write'; then programs=$(ls ~/.learnkit/ 2>/dev/null); for p in $programs; do result=$(learnkit check-prepare "$p" 2>/dev/null); if [ $? -eq 1 ]; then echo "[LearnKit] 📚 $p 需要备课 — 教案不足，建议运行 /learn-prepare $p"; fi; done; fi

cmd=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q '^learnkit serve'; then if curl -s http://localhost:13135/api/health > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo '[LearnKit] ℹ️ Backend 已在运行中'; fi; fi

if which learnkit > /dev/null 2>&1; then programs=$(ls ~/.learnkit/ 2>/dev/null); for p in $programs; do result=$(learnkit check-prepare "$p" 2>&1); if [ $? -eq 1 ]; then echo "[LearnKit] 💡 提醒: $p 的教案库存不足，下次记得 /learn-prepare"; fi; done; fi
